summary: The diff implements a score-10 easter egg milestone overlay as described in the build request. The feature is added to useGameState.ts (tracking refs, trigger logic, reset on restart), GameUI.tsx (street-art overlay with 'HOW ARE YOU STILL GOING' text in matching style), and Game.tsx (passing the new prop). Since the build request has no formal REQ-IDs or acceptance criteria, there are no missing requirements to flag. The implementation uses one-shot tracking refs (score10EasterEggTriggeredRef) and resets on restart, consistent with the one-shot constraint.
